title: Diverged-origin reconciliation as a BOUNDARY-SCOPED `evolve sync-main` command — NOT in-ship auto-merge (cycle-583 audit FAIL: merge-at-ship lands unaudited merged trees labeled audited)
summary: REDESIGNED after cycle-583 adversarial-review+audit FAIL (HIGH, independently confirmed at repair.go:513-515 vs gitops.go:493-497): auto-merging origin/main inside ship's push-repair lets git resolve textual conflicts while SEMANTIC conflicts stay invisible — the merged tree lands on main carrying the audited label although the merge RESULT was never audited. The integrity hole is real and routine (diverged origin recurred 3x on 2026-07-07). Original problem stands: operator PR merges mid-batch doom every subsequent lane ship (repair.go:375 refuses diverged) until a manual quiet-tree merge.
root_cause: Reconciliation was placed inside the audited-ship path where it breaks audit binding. It belongs OUTSIDE any cycle: a boundary operation on a quiet tree, where the next cycle's full pipeline naturally audits whatever the merge produced before anything new ships on top.
fix: New `evolve sync-main` operator/boundary command (cli/opscmd family): preconditions (no live evolve loop/cycle procs via runlease OwnerLive; clean index except gitignored; cycle-state idle) -> fetch -> if origin diverged: `git merge --no-edit origin/main`; on conflict abort cleanly and report; never rebase/force-push; never push (next lane ship pushes FF). Wire into loop BOOT recovery too: at batch start, BEFORE wave 1, if origin diverged and tree quiet, run the same sync (single code path, DI'd git exec). Ship's repair keeps refusing diverged origin (correct behavior — add a hint message pointing to `evolve sync-main`).
acceptance: RED: sync-main merges a diverged origin on a quiet tree (real-git fixture); refuses with actionable message when a live lease exists, when index is dirty, or on merge conflict (aborted cleanly, tree unchanged)
Loop boot: diverged origin reconciled before wave 1 (integration test via boot recovery seam); ship repair diverged message references sync-main
go vet, -race, apicover -enforce green; new symbols named per apicover
connects_to: cycle-583 audit FAIL + adversarial-review F1 (the integrity constraint this design honors)
